notes: Root causes: (1) CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW — Doris MV column lists take bare column names, not column defs with types; our generator emits types. (2) CREATE TABLE ... PARTITION BY (cols) — Doris grammar requires a partition kind (RANGE/LIST/AUTO ...) followed by a partition definition list; the bare PARTITION BY (cols) form we emit is rejected at <EOF> expecting '('.

Known bug NOT visible to this gate: the Doris dialect inherits MySQL's array rejection although Doris supports arrays, so no array case survives into ast-corpus/doris-serde.json (0 cases contain arrays) and the engine-side acceptance of arrays cannot be exercised here. Queued as a separate dialect fix.
